events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: concrete placement in progress, observed field condition is segregation from excessive drop height. This is a sequence/procedure violation. Per ACI 304, concrete should be placed to avoid segregation; drop heights limited (typically not more than 3-4 feet for vertical drops without chutes/troughs). Excessive drop height causing segregation means defective concrete placement. Work is actively in progress and non-compliant. Decision: fail. Risk: high (structural integrity compromised). Component condition: installed-defective, non-compliant. Need to stop placement, assess placed concrete, correct drop height method (use chute, tremie, pump, etc.), remove/replace defective concrete if segregation occurred.
